name: Meridian AI
oneliner: IDE-style agentic workspace that automates complex financial modeling and spreadsheet workflows with structured auditability for finance teams.
finserv: Early customers at Decagon and OffDeal; $5M in contracts in Dec 2025. Designed around auditability for finance teams. QED Investors participated alongside a16z.
team: John Ling (CEO), team from Scale AI, Anthropic, Goldman Sachs. $17M seed led by a16z and The General Partnership with QED Investors. $100M post-money.
thesis: Meridian targets the sprawling spreadsheet layer at the heart of FP&A and risk analysis. Its Cursor-style IDE builds traceability in from the ground up — exactly what regulators will mandate for agent-driven finance decisions.
